extensionDescription.message: Adds badges to anime with dubbing in configured languages.

headerTitle.description: Main header of the options page

headerSubtitle.message: Choose up to 3 audio languages to display badges for

infoBoxText.message: Badges will appear on anime cards that have audio available in the selected languages

warningMaxLanguages.message: ⚠️ You can select up to 3 languages

previewNoSelection.message: Select at least one language to see the preview
previewNoSelection.description: Message when no language is selected

errorSelectAtLeastOne.description: Error when no language is selected

errorMaxLanguages.message: You can select up to $MAX$ languages
errorMaxLanguages.description: Error when too many languages selected

successSaved.message: ✅ Settings saved! Reload Crunchyroll pages to see the changes.
